text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan hasn't been at her best, so I'm
taking her to a shrine to boost our motivation. As
we arrive...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey, Nakayama. Here to pray?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
As if. I'm just out for a stroll. Thought I might find
someone to get into some action with.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: And you? Not every day I find you at a shrine.
choice_data_list: She hasn't been in top form recently...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah? That's a coincidence. Actually, I've
been on a bit of a losing streak myself.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
At times like these, I just need one big
win—doesn't matter what it is—and I'll be back on
track. ...So how 'bout it, Jordan? Care for a
wager?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
If I can win, it'll turn my fortunes around! But one
more loss... and it'll be a downward spiral to hell!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that sounds like a pain. I don't know jack
about fortunes or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Oh... Afraid of losing? I get it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? That's not what I said.
choice_data_list: You don't have to force yourself to compete.
You don't have to force yourself to compete.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: No, I can do it! Fine by me. Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh! That's the spirit! All right, here's the bet...
You just have to guess whether the next person to
visit the shrine will be an Horsegirl or not. Easy-peasy,
right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Okay, I'll bet on "Horsegirl"!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Guess I've got "not Horsegirl." Game on!
WAAAAGH! Where are yooou?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Someone's here!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It's Tickezo! Woo! That means I win! ☆

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Heeey, Jordaaan! I was looking for you! I've
got something I gotta tell you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Right! So, like, there's a present at the dorm for
you! The box looks suuuper fancy!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
No cap?! It must be the prize I won in that online
raffle! Yass! One good thing after another!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: For real?! That's great! Seeing you happy makes me happy!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Tch... Looks like that's a bust for me. Seems like
you've got a stranglehold on all the good luck.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right. Are you gonna be okay? You
said something about the "bottom of hell" or
whatever?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I don't need your sympathy. I'm just extra pumped
now, heheh. I need to figure out how to crawl
back up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nakayama Festa leaves with a seemingly satisfied
expression. Afterward, Tosen Jordan's slump
seems to end miraculously!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, no one else shows up to the shrine, and
it's almost curfew...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Laaame... Why isn't anyone coming? This is
unreal.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Them's the breaks... We'll call it a draw. Let's have
our tiebreaker another day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with the match postponed, it looks like
Tosen Jordan's fortunes aren't going to be
improving today.
